Elite Security Division

Uncompromising Safety,
Absolute Discretion.

Bespoke protection strategies for the world's most discerning individuals. Our elite teams operate with surgical precision and invisible presence.

Consult a StrategistView Capabilities
The Pillars of Protection

Comprehensive Elite Security Solutions

Executive Protection

Personal bodyguards and celebrity protection for high-profile assets requiring constant vigilance without intrusion.

Learn More

Travel Security

International logistics, secure escorts, and global risk assessment for seamless cross-border mobility.

Global Operations

Residential Security

24/7 villa and estate protection utilising advanced surveillance and physical presence.

Estate Shield

Event Security

Specialised VIP management for private galas, corporate summits, and high-net-worth gatherings.

Event Protocol
The Opulent Vault Distinction

Female Security Specialists

For situations requiring a more subtle presence, specialised family protection, or cultural sensitivity, our elite female security personnel offer a unique combination of high-tier tactical training and soft-skills excellence.

  • check_circleDiscreet Family & Nanny Protection
  • check_circleInternational High-Stakes Travel Escorts
  • check_circleUnderstated Presence in Social Environments

Initiate Deployment Protocol

Security is not a commodity; it is a personalised architecture of safety. Share your requirements, and our senior strategists will contact you within 60 minutes.

Confidentiality Assured

All communications are encrypted and strictly confidential.

public

Global Response

Capabilities for deployment in over 120 countries within 24 hours.

AI-Powered, Human-Perfected

Your Personal Concierge,
Always On.

The Opulent Vault AI Concierge anticipates your needs before you even voice them. From property recommendations and private jet charters to bespoke experiences and 24/7 booking support — intelligence at your fingertips, luxury at every step.

  • check_smallInstant property recommendations tailored to your taste
  • check_smallPrivate aviation and helicopter transfer requests
  • check_smallCurated dining, spa, and experience bookings
  • check_smallRound-the-clock concierge and booking support
auto_awesome

OPV AI Concierge

Online

“Good evening. I have a preference for high-floor penthouses with panoramic city views in London this weekend. Can you arrange a private transfer from Heathrow as well?”

Certainly. I've identified three exceptional penthouses available this weekend — The Shard Residence, One Hyde Park, and The OPV Mayfair Suite. I've also reserved a Rolls-Royce Phantom for your Heathrow collection at 18:30. Shall I proceed?

Opulent Vault is Manchester's curated luxury lifestyle concierge marketplace.
